sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84520" key="politokope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῑτο-κοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n84520.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δημοκοπέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n84520.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λοιδορεῖν, κωμῳδεῖν</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:105" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">105</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:131" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">131</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
